key_point: AIDS is a condition caused by the HIV virus, which is a sexually transmitted infection.
AIDS is the late stage of HIV infection, and HIV can be transmitted through sexual contact.
AIDS is a condition caused by the HIV virus and is a sexually transmitted disease.
